chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 26 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Mumtaz Alam Leghari, advocate for petitioner Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keero, files power for respondent Nos. 5 to 9, taken on record. Mr. Wali Muhammad Jamari, Asstt: A.G. The detainee has filed affidavit before this Court that she is happily residing in the house of her deceased husband along with her children and his brother has filed this misconceived petition. This petition in view of the above stands disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
